text: I used to think discipline was about being perfect. Then I woke up at 5:30, hated it, and still went to the gym. Now I'm learning to embrace the sacrifice and pain for my dreams.
decision_reason: Meets requirements and is different from recent posts

text: You're not alone in struggling to get back on track. I see people posting their gym progress, but most of them don't show the days they don't want to show up. That's the real sacrifice.

audience_fit.desire: belonging to a group that gets it

decision_reason: Meets requirements and references an open storyline
